poster.recruitment.headline:
500 Resumes. One Right Hire.
Your Team Already Missed Her.
poster.recruitment.body: Half those resumes were written by AI. They all look the same. Your HR team skims for hours and still lets the best candidate slip through. Flame Source OS scores every application in seconds. Only the people worth meeting reach your desk.
poster.finance.headline:
Three People. Forty Hours.
One Wrong Number Undoes It All.
poster.finance.body: Payroll. Reconciliation. Invoicing. Forty hours a month of copy-paste-check-repeat — and someone still keys in the wrong number. Flame Source OS runs the entire cycle. No manual entry. No late nights. No correction email the next morning.
poster.music.headline:
The Song Took One Night.
The Arrangement Killed Three Weeks.
poster.music.body: The melody is done. Then the grind starts — layering, mixing, waiting on collaborators. For Singapore artists, that gap kills momentum and income. Flame Source OS handles arrangement and instrumentation in days, not weeks. Your sound stays yours.
poster.restaurant.headline:
"Less Oil. Extra Crispy. No Chili."
Your Burmese Server Got
Every Word.
poster.restaurant.body: Dish names are easy. The real problem is "less salt", "crispier", "don't overcook it". AR smart glasses give your server real-time subtitles of exactly what the customer said — no awkward pauses, just a natural conversation. Off the floor, an AI tutor drills them on real requests until the glasses become a safety net, not a crutch.
poster.sales.headline:
First Week on the Floor.
She Closed Like a Ten-Year Vet.
poster.sales.body: New reps fail because nobody is beside them when it counts. Flame Source OS listens to every customer conversation live and coaches your rep on what to say next — like having your best closer in every room. Study-abroad consultancies. Hair salons. Any team that sells face-to-face.
hero.headline: AI That Actually Ships.
hero.sub: Your team burns 40% of its hours on work a machine should own.
hero.sub2: Flame Source OS fixes that — one workflow at a time.
gap.label: The Problem
gap.title:
Every Company Has AI.
Almost None Get Results.
gap.body1: You bought the tools. You hired the people. Six months later the chatbot handles four questions and your ops team still lives in spreadsheets. The models are powerful. The problem? Nobody wired them to your actual business.
gap.body2: The gap isn't intelligence. It's execution. You don't need another dashboard or another pilot programme. You need AI that touches the work — payroll, screening, ordering, translation — and moves a number your CFO can point to.
gap.stat: of enterprise AI projects never reach production
product.label: Flame Source OS
product.title:
Tell Us the Problem.
We Ship the Fix.
product.desc: An AI operating system that orchestrates models, tools, and workflows — so your team makes decisions, not configurations.
product.f1.title: Model Routing
product.f1.body: Picks the right AI model for each task automatically — balancing speed, accuracy, and cost. No prompt tuning. No vendor lock-in.
product.f2.title: Skill Library
product.f2.body: Pre-built, domain-specific skills for recruitment, finance, content, translation, and more. Each skill encodes expert logic — not just prompts.
product.f3.title: Zero Prompt Engineering
product.f3.body: Describe the outcome in plain language. The OS handles decomposition, tool selection, error recovery, and quality checks.
cap.label: Under the Hood
cap.title: What Powers Flame Source OS
cap.desc: Three layers that make the operating system work.
cap.c1.title: AI Orchestration
cap.c1.body: Multi-model routing, task decomposition, autonomous error recovery. The OS picks the right model, chains the right tools, and verifies every output before it ships.
cap.c2.title: Integration Engineering
cap.c2.body: Connectors to ERPs, CRMs, databases, and custom APIs. We wire AI into your existing stack — no rip-and-replace, no six-month migration.
cap.c3.title: Intelligent Hardware
cap.c3.body: When software alone isn't enough, we design IoT sensors and edge devices that feed real-world data straight into the AI pipeline. 34 patents. 150+ countries.
team.label: Team
team.title: Who We Are
team.wu.bio: Co-founded GameSir, a gaming peripherals brand now sold in 150+ countries. Holds 34 patents in precision sensing and wireless technology. Manages our Guangzhou hardware supply chain. B.Eng., South China University of Technology.
team.chen.bio: years in software engineering. Previously led a 100+ engineer team building products that reached RMB 100M+ monthly revenue. Runs our Guangzhou development team. Deep expertise in distributed systems and AI automation.
team.leonard.bio: Singaporean based in Singapore, handling client relationships, project delivery, and local operations. Built AI marketing automation tools and digital ordering platforms for F&B businesses. Bachelor of Business Studies, University College Dublin.
contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Talk
privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: When you contact us through our website, we collect the personal data you provide: your name, email address, and message content.
privacy.p2: We use your personal data solely to respond to your enquiry and communicate with you about our services.
privacy.p3: For data protection queries, contact us at info@flamesource.ai.
privacy.p4: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal data to third parties.
privacy.p5: Enquiry data is retained for a maximum of 12 months, then securely deleted.
privacy.p6: Under the PDPA, you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data, or withdraw consent. Contact us at info@flamesource.ai.
